title: SodiumLeafCulling-Unofficial
description: An unofficial port of SodiumLeafCulling by Txni
body:
## Description

An unofficial port of SodiumLeafCulling by Txni

## Credits
- txni: Original author


## Original description

Smart leaf culling algorithm for Sodium on 1.21+

### What does this do?

This Sodium addon optimizes the performance of leaves, which are typically more costly to render due to their transparency.

Unlike other leaf culling performance mods, this mod injects directly into Sodium's chunk mesh render pipeline and provides a few new modes. The default is "Solid Aggressive," which will make the insides of large blocks of leaves run in solid non-transparent FAST mode, while maintaining the FANCY mode leaves on the outside. This can lead to a sizable performance boost when using shaders in a dense forest. A more traditional "Hollow" culling mode is also available, which greedily culls vertices inside the tree.

Downloads are available for NeoForge and Fabric. It will not be backported.
